subcodes.first_line: From the shrill voice of the Most Exalted Pen was heard this most sublime Word: The Sovereign hath come, the Kingdom is God's! Through His manifestation hath appeared what was hidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از صریر قلم اعلی این کلمه علیا اصغا شد قد اتی المالک الملک لله بظهوره ظهر ما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
